name: Kerry Express (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Kerry Express (Thailand) Public Company Limited provides parcel delivery services in Thailand, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Vietnam, Cambodia, and Malaysia. It primarily serves international express firms, e-commerce companies, home shopping channels, banks, technology firms, telecom companies, financial institutes, and schools, as well as local retail chains. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Kerry Express (Thailand) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of KLN Logistics (Thailand) Limited.
